_readme: pipeline v7 — whisper 실측+간격배분+감쇠보정, QA 통과분
title: take a rain check

sentences.en: You know that was over five months ago?
sentences.ko: 그게 벌써 다섯 달도 더 전인 거 알아?

sentences.en: ★ Oh, yeah. No, no, we got to do that again, for sure, but okay if we take a rain check?
sentences.ko: ★ 아 그렇지. 아니야, 또 하자, 꼭. 근데 다음 기회로 미뤄도 될까?

sentences.en: You're awful cute, you know that?
★ Well, it's true, you are. So I'll see you. Don't take too long, doll. You're not getting any younger.
sentences.ko: ★ 사실이에요. 그럼 또 봐요. 너무 오래 끌지 말고요. 당신도 더 젊어지진 않으니까.
